nrb.sid.description: Development/default HTTP session cookie. SESSION_COOKIE_NAME may override the runtime name.

__Host-nrb.sid.description: Production default HTTPS session cookie. SESSION_COOKIE_NAME may override the runtime name.
__Host-nrb.sid.name: __Host-nrb.sid
